title_original: UK Government Commits £2B to Quantum Computing Procurement and Industry Scale-Up - HPCwire
summary_original: The United Kingdom government has announced a £2 billion investment aimed at boosting quantum computing procurement and supporting the scale-up of related industries, as reported by HPCwire. This significant funding targets both research and commercial deployment of quantum technologies within the United Kingdom. The initiative reflects the government's ongoing commitment to position the country as a leader in quantum computing, helping to advance scientific discovery and industrial competitiveness. Key goals cited include strengthening collaboration between academia and industry, and accelerating the transition of quantum research into real-world applications. This announcement marks one of the most substantial public funding commitments to quantum computing in the United Kingdom to date.
